title: VoxelMon
description: An adapted version of the Cobblemon modpack tailored for the VoxelMMO community, featuring new quality-of-life improvements and additional  content.
body:
![Image of a Pokemon in the wild](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c6971ea1357112f5c4ef8be06a268dc7780d68a6_0.webp)
This modpack includes all the essential mods needed to play on the **VoxelMon Server**.
![Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bb33baaa56a29164af3620bb8be784af03ad49d3.png)
## 🧭 Included Features
- **Capture Pokémon** to expand your team, battle wild Pokémon to gain experience, level up to unlock new moves, and evolve your Pokémon. There are over 700 Pokémon to catch! - Enjoy **smooth, optimized performance** with Sodium, Lithium, FerriteCore, and more. Run shaders with Iris for gorgeous visuals without sacrificing FPS! - Use **REI** to view, organize, and search every recipe with ease. Tons of addons enrich crafting, smithing, brewing, cooking, and automation. - Explore a more **alive and atmospheric world** with falling leaves, improved footsteps, ambient sounds, dynamic lights, better particles, and biome enhancements. - Navigate the world effortlessly with **Xaero's Minimap & World Map**, claim land, form teams, and manage permissions with **Open Parties and Claims**. - Talk to friends using built-in **Proximity Voice Chat**, perfect for SMP adventures, building sessions, and exploration. - Decorate your world with **Another Furniture, Supplementaries, Let’s Do Furniture, Comforts**, and many more building expansions. - Harvest, cook, and farm using **Farmer’s Delight** and additional agriculture and food mods. - Enjoy improved combat and movement with **enhanced attack indicators**, cleaner custom UI, third-person upgrades, better animations, and smoother controls. - Hundreds of **quality-of-life** mods like Better Advancements, ModMenu, Crafting Tweaks, and Chat Improvements help streamline gameplay. - Fully compatible with multiplayer and perfect for long-term survival worlds.
![Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/80babd6ab4929d4a98127c8bafec06c4a2fdb400.png)
## 🖥️ Technical Details
Recommended to run with a minimum of **4GB** of memory. Use **6-8 GB** or more for best performance.
This modpack is only intended for NeoForge, we don't have plans to expand for other versions.
![Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aba5d51f750436b234d1be48bf5b0675d699a949.png)
### VoxelMon is not affiliated with Pokémon nor Minecraft.
Minecraft is a trademark of Mojang Synergies AB
Pokémon is a trademark of Nintendo, Creatures Inc. and GAME FREAK inc.
